using namespace std;

typedef long long ll;

#define se second

#define setbit(x, y) (x |= (1LL << y))

#define clearbit(x, y) (x &= ~(1LL << y))

#define togglebit(x, y) (x ^= (1LL << y))

#define checkbit(x, y) (x & (1LL << y))

#define modulo(x, y) (((x % y) + y) % y)
